env.AUTH_SECRET: Your Auth.js session secret — generate with: openssl rand -base64 32
env.NEXTAUTH_SECRET: Same value as AUTH_SECRET (Auth.js v5 alias)
env.POS_API_URL: Server-to-server base URL for pos-api, e.g. https://api.your-domain.com
env.SENTRY_DSN: (optional) Sentry DSN for server-side error capture
env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN: (optional) Sentry DSN exposed to the browser
